summary: Replace native desktop window decorations with a compact app-rendered title bar that preserves drag, minimize, maximize, and close controls.

review_items.summary: The Tauri window becomes frameless and the React WebView renders the visible title bar.
The app grants only the window commands needed for custom chrome: drag, minimize, toggle maximize, and close.
App.jsx owns the compact title bar, window control buttons, and content inset below the title bar.

rules: Custom window chrome must keep close, minimize, maximize, and drag behavior available.
Window control buttons must use the Tauri window API rather than app-auth or backend APIs.
The custom title bar must appear for both signed-out and authenticated states.
This change must not alter desktop auth, session storage, or backend API contracts.

tests.summary: Validate the desktop React shell builds.
Validate Tauri config and capability changes.
